text:
Ans.
Yes, There is a pattern in each case.
Powers of 2-
1,2,4 = 2 x 2, 8 = 2 x 2 x2 ,16 = 2 x 2 x2 x 2 x 2..
Powers of 3 - 1, 3, 9 = 3 x 3 = 27 =3 x 3 x3,...
Virahanka numbers- 1,2, 3, 5 = 2 + 3, 8 = 3 + 5, 13 = 5 + 8,....
Rest of the patterns have been shown on
page 4 ,Table 2
